utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: and then , we could have gone from the ceremony to the reception with you in the sidecar !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross , it just would not have been feasible .

emotion_cause.span: 2_it just would not have been feasible .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: But having a dove place the ring on your finger would have been no problem ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_having a dove place the ring on your finger would have been no problem ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It was really fun being married to you tonight .

emotion_cause.span: 4_It was really fun being married to you tonight .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah ! And ! And , it was the easiest 400 bucks I have ever made .

emotion_cause.span: 5_it was the easiest 400 bucks I have ever made .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay Ross , can I uh , can I ask you something ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: That proposal , at the planetarium

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: I know , I know it was stupid .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Are you kidding ? !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: With the , with the lilies , and ... and the song , and the stars !

emotion_cause.span: 11_With the , with the lilies , and ... and the song , and the stars !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It was ... really wonderful !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Did you just make that up ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No , actually I thought about it when , when we were going out .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is how I imagined I uh , I would ask you to marry me .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , that would have been very hard to say no too .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: It is a good thing I did not do it , because it sounds like it would have been a very expensive wedding . Okay , good night

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Goodnight

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Even if the sidecar had a windscreen so your hair would not get messed up ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I will think about it .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: That is all I am askin
